projects.title: Inventory Management System
projects.description: The Inventory Management System is a web-based application designed to help efficiently manage their stock levels, track product movement, and inventory updates
projects.longDescription: The Inventory Management System is a web-based application designed to help efficiently manage their stock levels, track product movement, and inventory updates. This system provides real-time insights into stock availability, reduces manual errors, and improves operational efficiency.

projects.title: Byte Brief News Platform
projects.description: Developed an AI-powered web application to deliver personalized, real-time news summaries, enhancing user experience through intelligent content filtering and responsive design.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive news aggregation platform built with Django and React. It features an automated news scraper, AI-driven summarization pipeline, and real-time notification system. Includes personal user accounts via Google OAuth, custom news categories, deep-linking, and responsive UI design for mobile devices.

projects.title: Conversational Image Recognition Chatbot
projects.description: Built an image recognition chatbot that allows users to upload or describe images and receive intelligent, conversational responses. Combines computer vision with natural language processing for an interactive experience.
projects.longDescription: Developed an interactive chatbot that integrates computer vision and NLP to enable users to have conversations about images. The system can identify objects, scenes, and activities in images and respond to follow-up questions contextually. Utilized Google Cloud Vision API and transformer-based language models for accurate understanding.

projects.title: Text-Emotion Classification
projects.description: Developed a deep learning model for classifying emotions from text with high accuracy using Convolutional and Recurrent Neural Networks. Supports multi-label emotion detection across 6 emotion categories.
projects.longDescription: Built a robust text classification pipeline that preprocesses raw text, extracts features, and classifies emotions like joy, sadness, anger, fear, surprise, and disgust. Implemented data augmentation, transfer learning with BERT embeddings, and model ensemble techniques to improve accuracy.
challenges: Ensuring model reliability for medical use

projects.title: Mental Health Chatbot
projects.description: Developed an empathetic mental health chatbot that provides conversational support, mood tracking, and resource recommendations. Designed to be a safe, non-judgmental companion for mental wellness.
projects.longDescription: Created a conversational AI assistant focused on mental health support. The chatbot uses NLP to understand user emotions and respond empathetically. It provides coping strategies, mood-tracking functionality, and connects users with professional resources when needed. Built with an emphasis on user safety and data privacy.

projects.title: Facial Recognition System
projects.description: Developed a real-time facial recognition system using deep learning for identity verification and attendance tracking. Leverages CNN-based face embeddings for accurate, low-latency recognition.
projects.longDescription: Built a face recognition pipeline that detects, aligns, and embeds faces using a deep CNN. The system can identify known individuals in real-time from a webcam feed or video input with high accuracy. Applied data augmentation and triplet loss training for robust performance across lighting and pose variations.
challenges: Cold start problem for new users
